metadata.investigating_officer: SI Rajesh Kumar, Noida PS Sector 16

content: CCTV footage from the pawnshop ‘Golden Key’ shows a male entering at 11:16 and returning a red motorcycle (UP-12-CD-4567) at 11:18. The individual is wearing a black hoodie and gloves. He hands over the keys and a ₹5,000 reward receipt. The pawnshop owner, Ramesh Patel, identifies the build and gait as matching Ramesh Kumar. The individual states, 'Found it near the expressway, thought I’d claim the reward.' The motorcycle was reported stolen on October 13 by Bittu Singh. The pawnshop owner was not aware of the kidnapping at the time. This footage was not disclosed in Bittu Singh’s original statement.
